steps.title: Understanding function graphs
steps.content: When the graph of a function passes through a point $(a, b)$, the definition tells us that $f(a) = b$. The $x$-coordinate becomes the input, and the $y$-coordinate becomes the output.

steps.title: Find f(5)
steps.content: The problem says the graph passes through $(5, 2)$. Using our understanding from Step 1, the input is 5 and the output is 2, so $f(5) = 2$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
